lessons.title: Why Layers? The Burrito Analogy
lessons.description: Discover why networking is split into 7 distinct layers and how this simplifies everything.

lessons.title: Layers 1-2: Physical & Data Link
lessons.description: Cables, voltages, MAC addresses, and the local network neighborhood.

lessons.title: Layer 3: The Network Layer (IP)
lessons.description: Routing, IP addresses, and how data finds its way across the planet.

lessons.title: Layer 4: The Transport Layer (TCP/UDP)
lessons.description: Reliable delivery, port numbers, and the handshake that starts every connection.

lessons.title: Layers 5-7: Session, Presentation, Application
lessons.description: The layers users actually see – HTTP, encryption, and managing conversations.
